CVE-2023-39663.title: Mathjax up to v2.7.9 was discovered to contain two Regular expres ...
CVE-2023-39663.description: Mathjax up to v2.7.9 was discovered to contain two Regular expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) vulnerabilities in MathJax.js via the components pattern and markdownPattern. NOTE: the vendor disputes this because the regular expressions are not applied to user input; thus, there is no risk.
